sequence.title: Lighthouse Dawn — 60s
sequence.logline: As dawn breaks over a lonely headland, an old keeper and his apprentice bring the great lamp through its final sweep of the night.
sequence.script:
LIGHTHOUSE DAWN — 60 second sequence

EXT. HEADLAND — DAWN
Mist drifts over the sea. A solitary white lighthouse stands on a rocky headland as the first golden light breaks through. We drift toward it from the air, slow and deliberate.

EXT. ROCKS BELOW THE TOWER — DAWN
Waves hammer the dark rocks at the base of the cliff. Spray hangs in the golden light.

INT. LIGHTHOUSE STAIR — CONTINUOUS
Wren, the young apprentice, climbs the narrow spiral of iron stairs, lamp oil can in hand. Shafts of warm dawn light cut through the small windows; dust motes turn in the beams.

INT. LAMP ROOM — CONTINUOUS
The Keeper stands silhouetted against the glass as the great beacon makes its final rotation of the night, the beam sweeping past us in blue and gold.

locations.name: Lighthouse Headland
locations.description: The exterior world of the sequence: a solitary white lighthouse on a rocky headland above the sea, wrapped in dawn mist.
locations.prompt: A solitary white lighthouse with a red lantern gallery on a rugged rocky headland above a cold grey-green sea, soft golden dawn light breaking through low mist, waves at the cliff base, no people, photorealistic, cinematic 16:9 film look

locations.name: Tower Interior
locations.description: Inside the lighthouse: the narrow spiral iron staircase and the glass lamp room at the top.
locations.prompt: Interior of an old working lighthouse: narrow spiral iron staircase painted deep green, whitewashed stone walls, small porthole windows admitting shafts of warm dawn light, dust motes in the beams, worn brass fittings, photorealistic, cinematic 16:9 film look

characters.name: The Keeper
characters.description: The old lighthouse keeper, nearing the end of his last night watch.
characters.prompt: A weathered lighthouse keeper in his late 60s, short grey beard, dark navy wool sweater and oilskin coat, flat cap, deep-set kind eyes, standing posture of quiet patience, photorealistic character reference, soft directional dawn light, cinematic

characters.name: Wren
characters.description: The keeper's teenage apprentice, up before dawn to tend the lamp.
characters.prompt: A teenage lighthouse apprentice, short dark wind-tousled hair, freckles, heavy cream fisherman's jumper with rolled sleeves, canvas trousers, carrying a small brass oil can, earnest expression, photorealistic character reference, warm lamplight, cinematic

elements.name: The Beacon Lamp
elements.description: The lighthouse's great rotating Fresnel lens and lamp — the heart of the tower.
elements.prompt: A massive antique first-order Fresnel lens beacon in a lighthouse lamp room, concentric glass prisms glowing warm gold from the lamp within, polished brass frame, surrounded by wraparound glass windows showing dawn sky, photorealistic, cinematic

elements.name: Dawn Mist
elements.description: Low sea mist that softens the headland and catches the first golden light.
elements.prompt: Low-hanging sea mist drifting over dark ocean water and rocky shore at dawn, golden sunlight diffusing through the fog in soft volumetric rays, atmospheric, photorealistic, cinematic 16:9 film look

EXT. HEADLAND — DAWN
Mist drifts over the sea. A solitary white lighthouse stands on a rocky headland as the first golden light breaks through. We drift toward it from the air, slow and deliberate.

scenes.title: Waves at the rocks
scenes.scriptExcerpt:
EXT. ROCKS BELOW THE TOWER — DAWN
Waves hammer the dark rocks at the base of the cliff. Spray hangs in the golden light.
scenes.synopsis: The power of the sea: waves crash on the rocks below the tower, spray glowing in dawn light.

shots.description: Low, slow-motion waves crashing against the rocks beneath the lighthouse.

shots.camera: Low angle, locked off, slow motion

frames.end: Low angle still of white water and sea spray exploding over dark wet rocks below a white lighthouse at dawn, droplets frozen in golden light, photorealistic, cinematic 16:9 film still

shots.description: Close on spray drifting through golden light after the impact.

frames.end: Close-up still of thinning sea mist drifting through warm golden dawn light, dark rocks softly out of focus below, photorealistic, cinematic 16:9 film still

Wren, the young apprentice, climbs the narrow spiral of iron stairs, lamp oil can in hand. Shafts of warm dawn light cut through the small windows; dust motes turn in the beams.

INT. LAMP ROOM — CONTINUOUS
The Keeper stands silhouetted against the glass as the great beacon makes its final rotation of the night, the beam sweeping past us in blue and gold.
